name: environment_emergency_exemption_millhaven_lib_eq
premise: A wildfire retardant drop is requested over a drinking-water intake; hydrologists disagree on dilution risk under current flow. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment emergency exemption millhaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Harper Park
agents.identity: I am Harper Park, the accountable executive on this bridge in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Navarro
agents.identity: I am Hector Navarro, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on equality.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on equality for immediate traction on liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Harper Park must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Harper Park do?
